injections.injection.content: indicates that the captured node should have its contents re-parsed using another language
injections.injection.language: indicates that the captured node’s text may contain the name of a language that should be used to re-parse the `@injection.content`

lint.error: indicates the captured node is the source of the error
lint.visible: indicates the captured node is relevant and should be visible
lint.context: indicates captured node should be highlighted
lint.name: diagnostic name such as `no-crappy-code`
lint.title: diagnostic headline such as `Do not write code like this`
lint.label: label applied to the captured error such as `problem here`
lint.fix: automatic fix to address the issue
lint.context.label: label applied to context such as `previously defined here`

symbols.selection: identifier of the symbol, must be within @range
symbols.modifier: public, protected, private, static, final, etc
symbols.deprecated: valid capture if symbol is deprecated
symbols.detail: additional symbol detail such as parameters

eq.description: checks for equality between two nodes, or a node and a string

any-of.description: match any of the given strings against the text corresponding to a node

match.description: Match a regexp against the text corresponding to a node

set.description: sets key/value metadata for a specific match or capture
